title: blechnum glandulosum var. meridionale
intro: Blechnum glandulosum var. meridionale, also known as the Australian water fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Blechnaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blechnum glandulosum var. meridionale include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also sometimes used in modern herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
